name: Damien Yap
excerpt: Assisted by Jeremy, the boss himself, who was incredibly patient and knowledgeable. He even recommended a good zi char stall for us to have the crabs cooked.

name: CY
excerpt: The freshness, amazing quality, and incredible roe are just so good. It’s the best place for live seafood, always impressive.

name: byron teo
excerpt: Absolutely gem find hidden amidst the most unexpected place! The good crab is superb with rich thick roe.

name: Google reviewer
excerpt: Totally no experience in buying crab or lobster. Trusted the owner to recommend. Crabs were sweet and meaty. Lobsters were just as awesome.
